- AC3 commit-trailer builder derives signer via agent-signature; rejects hand-typed alias
- AC4 unit tests each; byte-identical determinism asserted; wired into quality-gates
- AC5 files <=100 lines; reuses #2671 deriveSigner (no parallel signer logic)

fields.overlap_decision: no-overlap — #2672 owns the 3 NON-comment artifacts (PR body, CHANGELOG fragment, commit trailers); #2671 owns the 6 comment artifacts. #2672 reuses #2671's deriveSigner util (dependency, not duplication). decision=proceed.

name: COLLABORATOR_HANDOFF-2675

fields.scope: Add the replay-eval promotion gate: scripts/global/baton-replay-eval.js (replayEval -> {total,matched,rate,mismatches}; meetsGate at >=0.85), scripts/global/baton-builder-mode.js (MEGINGJORD_BATON_BUILDER_DEFAULT opt-in/rollback flag), docs/howto/baton-builder-promotion.md, and a seed corpus. Builders flip to default only when replay-eval reproduces >=85% of the historical corpus byte-identical — replay-eval-gated, no calendar threshold. Seed corpus rate 0.75 < gate, so default stays opt-in (honest advisory state).
fields.per_ac_verification:
- AC1 replay-eval harness over a historical corpus: PASS — replayEval computes rate/matched/mismatches; tests 'computes rate', 'render error counts as mismatch', 'empty corpus throws', seed-corpus run
- AC2 promotion doc with >=85% gate + rollback env flag: PASS — docs/howto/baton-builder-promotion.md (gate table, env-flag table, current advisory state); tests 'meetsGate boundary' + 'builder mode opt-in/toggle'
- AC3 builds on #2671 #2672 #2673 #2674 (all merged); wired into quality-gates: PASS — 7/7 green; quality-gates.yml line added + verified in commit (git show HEAD)
fields.doc_coverage:

UPDATED: .changes/unreleased/2675.md — Added fragment (builder-generated)

fields.cross_family_findings: VERDICT ACCEPT (the 'BLOCKING'-tagged bullet describes correct gate logic, consistent with the ACCEPT verdict — a labeling quirk, not a blocker).
